news.paragraph: Netflix is preparing to expand its ad-supported subscription tier to 15 additional countries, which serves as a potential growth catalyst. Although the stock has experienced a 16% decline over the past month, recent commentary suggests reasons to hold the position as content spending continues to shape the company's valuation.
